prompt: A high-quality anime illustration of a young girl with short brown hair with cat ears and blue eyes standing in a post-apocalyptic wasteland. She is wearing a white short-sleeve shirt, blue plaid pleated skirt, black thigh-high socks with white stripes, and a heavy tactical chest rig, equipped with a backpack, a wrist-mounted retro-futuristic computer device, and a katana strapped to her waist. The background features a bright blue sky with scattered white clouds. To her right is a heavily rusted brick building with a large, weathered red sign on the roof partially reading "RED R" alongside a red rocket sculpture. In the foreground, there is a rusted bright blue metal container cart, and to the left, a dilapidated, rusted blue car sits among dry, overgrown weeds and debris. The scene combines vibrant anime character design with detailed, realistic textures of rust and decay.
